title: acosta micranthos
intro: Acosta micranthos, also known as the small-flowered Acosta, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues. Acosta micranthos contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting relaxation. The plant is traditionally prepared as a decoction or infusion by boiling its leaves in water, making it a popular herbal remedy in some regions.
